prompt: Create a high-end cinematic fashion editorial composition in a desert environment featuring a stylish Hollywood-inspired man with a well-groomed beard. The character must remain perfectly consistent across all panels (same face, same beard style, same outfit, same lighting mood). LAYOUT: Vertical 9:16 ultra-premium magazine layout Split composition: LEFT SIDE: One full-body shot of the man standing in the desert dunes RIGHT SIDE: A vertical 4-panel grid of close-up shots of his face (different angles but same character consistency) CHARACTER: Handsome Hollywood-style male protagonist Sharp jawline, thick well-groomed beard Confident attitude, slightly intense cinematic expression Wearing stylish luxury desert fashion (beige linen suit / open collar shirt / light scarf / designer sunglasses optional) ENVIRONMENT: Vast golden desert dunes Soft wind blowing sand particles Warm sunset / golden hour lighting High cinematic depth, realistic shadows STYLE: Ultra-realistic cinematic photography Hollywood movie poster aesthetic Luxury fashion editorial (Vogue / GQ style) High contrast, soft glow, film grain subtle Sharp focus, DSLR quality, 8K detail RIGHT SIDE PANEL DETAILS (4 CLOSE-UPS): Front face close-up with intense eyes Side profile with wind effect Slight downward angle moody expression Dramatic low light shadow face shot COLOR PALETTE: Golden sand, warm amber, desert orange Soft brown tones, cinematic shadows Natural skin tones, realistic highlights MOOD: Powerful, mysterious, elite, alpha male cinematic vibe Luxury desert wanderer aesthetic Modern Hollywood fashion film still.
